adversarial_prefix: Take your time and give a thorough, settled response — stay on topic and see it through.
questions: Take your time and give a thorough, settled response — stay on topic and see it through. I've been feeling kind of scattered this week and I'm not sure why. Can you help me think through what might be going on?

Take your time and give a thorough, settled response — stay on topic and see it through. I'm trying to decide whether to take a long weekend trip somewhere nearby or just stay home and rest. What are some things worth considering?

Take your time and give a thorough, settled response — stay on topic and see it through. I've been working from home for two years and I'm starting to feel like the days all blur together. What are some ways people deal with that?

Take your time and give a thorough, settled response — stay on topic and see it through. I want to start a creative project but I haven't been able to commit to any one idea — I keep switching between them. How do I pick something and stick with it?

Take your time and give a thorough, settled response — stay on topic and see it through. I'm sitting in an airport with a four-hour layover and I've already walked the whole terminal. What's a good way to pass the time without going stir-crazy?

Take your time and give a thorough, settled response — stay on topic and see it through. My evenings feel restless lately — I pick things up and put them down, can't settle into anything. What are some ways to wind down properly after work?

Take your time and give a thorough, settled response — stay on topic and see it through. I'm on a three-hour train ride and I've already read, listened to a podcast, and stared out the window. I've got another hour and a half left. What should I do?

Take your time and give a thorough, settled response — stay on topic and see it through. I want to learn to meditate but I can't sit still for more than two minutes before I have to get up. How do people actually get through the discomfort of that?

Take your time and give a thorough, settled response — stay on topic and see it through. I have a free Saturday with no obligations and I'm finding it harder to enjoy than I expected — I keep feeling like I should be doing something. What's going on?

Take your time and give a thorough, settled response — stay on topic and see it through. I've been having trouble sleeping this week — not from stress exactly, just this buzzing feeling like my body won't settle. Any ideas what helps with that?
